string.text: You need to bring tools to Vilnov so he can perform equipment upgrades.

You know, buddy, I’m actually not a bad technician. I can fix weapons and armor, even do some upgrades! Well, I could, if I had proper tools. But where do you get them around here? Maybe you could help me get a basic toolkit, huh?
I need a set of basic tools. It should have the instruments and oils for working with weapons. If you can bring it, I’ll be grateful, I might even pay you!.. Probably.
Awesome, man! Oh, sorry, I’ve got nothing to pay you with. But I can give you a good discount!
You need to bring Vilnov a set of fine tools. He needs a more complete kit to perform more advanced equipment upgrades.
Hey man, if you agree to get me a more complete set, you’ll get an even bigger discount. Will you help, pal?
I need a set of fine tools. Everything I need should be in there. You’ll be like a brother to me if you bring it!

Holy crap, thanks, bro! Now I’ll definitely get rich. Damn, I’ll finally be successful!.. If I don’t blow this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
You need to bring Vilnov %s. He needs a unique set to perform even more advanced equipment upgrades.
Hey kid, if you find something really valuable – I’ll give you a discount!
I need a set of calibration tools. It should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you bring it!

No fuc—! Damn, thanks, bro! Now I’ll definitely get rich. Hell, I’ll finally be successful!.. If I don’t blow this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
